title: oenothera sackvillensis var. royfraseri
intro: Oenothera sackvillensis var. royfraseri, also known as the Evening Primrose, is a perennial flowering plant species native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera sackvillensis var. royfraseri include alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings, as well as reducing inflammation and improving skin health. Herbal preparations of the plant are often taken in capsule or oil form, and can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy digestive system.
